---
title: "Adapter Specs"
subtitle: "Per-adapter operational design, runtime profile, and control mapping"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Integrators · adapter implementers · control assessors"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
---

# Adapter Specs {.unnumbered}

Per-adapter technical specifications. Each adapter in the canonical
`adapter-registry.yaml` gets exactly one spec in this tree; frontmatter is
regenerated from canon on every sync. Adapter specs are paired 1:1 with
entries in [Validation Suites](../validation-suites/index.qmd).

## Pages in this section

Adapters currently in canon:

| Slug | Adapter | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| `cyberark` | CyberArk PAM | `adapter-registry.yaml#cyberark` |
| `entra-id` | Microsoft Entra ID | `adapter-registry.yaml#entra-id` |
| `infoblox` | Infoblox DDI | `adapter-registry.yaml#infoblox` |
| `intune` | Microsoft Intune | `adapter-registry.yaml#intune` |
| `m365` | Microsoft 365 | `adapter-registry.yaml#m365` |
| `mainframe` | Mainframe integration | `adapter-registry.yaml#mainframe` |
| `palo-alto` | Palo Alto Networks | `adapter-registry.yaml#palo-alto` |
| `patch-state` | Patch state collector | `adapter-registry.yaml#patch-state` |
| `pki-ca` | PKI certificate authority | `adapter-registry.yaml#pki-ca` |
| `scuba` | CISA SCuBA | `adapter-registry.yaml#scuba` |
| `scubagear` | SCuBAGear assessment | `adapter-registry.yaml#scubagear` |
| `service-now` | ServiceNow ITSM | `adapter-registry.yaml#service-now` |
| `siem` | SIEM ingest | `adapter-registry.yaml#siem` |
| `stig-compliance` | DISA STIG compliance | `adapter-registry.yaml#stig-compliance` |
| `terraform` | Terraform state | `adapter-registry.yaml#terraform` |
| `vuln-scan` | Vulnerability scan ingest | `adapter-registry.yaml#vuln-scan` |

::: {.callout-note}
This list is regenerated from `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml` by
`src/uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`. Drift between this index and the registry
is CI-blocking.
:::
